inputs.label: Cut Area at Station 1
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of cut at the first station.

inputs.label: Cut Area at Station 2
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of cut at the second station.

inputs.label: Fill Area at Station 1
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of fill at the first station.

inputs.label: Fill Area at Station 2
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of fill at the second station.

inputs.label: Distance Between Stations
inputs.businessContext: Distance along the alignment between the two cross-sections.

inputs.label: Shrinkage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Shrinkage factor (e.g., 0.9 for 10% shrinkage, 1.0 for no shrinkage).
